description: A large industrial customer wants to source Renewable Natural Gas (RNG) to reduce the carbon footprint of their thermal processes.

nodes.task_description: Identify available RNG suppliers that can inject into the customer's local gas distribution network.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds two eligible RNG producers (from landfills and dairy farms).

nodes.task_description: Request quotes from the suppliers for a 5-year fixed-price contract for a specific volume of RNG.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves quotes from both suppliers.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the quotes and advise the customer on the most cost-effective option.

expected_outcome.value: Agent recommends a supplier and summarizes the contract terms.
